PR surface: Tests +720. Total +720 across 1 file.

target.title: test(firecrawl): add unit tests for firecrawl client functions
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`extensions/firecrawl/src/firecrawl-client.ts` exports 7 functions through its `testing` object, but only HTTP-integrated tests existed — none covered the pure business logic: URL safety validation, search-item extraction from multiple response shapes, and scrape-payload parsing.

## Why This Change Was Made

Adds `extensions/firecrawl/src/firecrawl-client.test.ts` covering all three testable scopes:

- **`assertFirecrawlScrapeTargetAllowed`** (15 tests): URL validation — valid public HTTPS, invalid strings, non-HTTP protocols, private/loopback IPv4/IPv6, blocked hostnames, embedded credentials, missing scheme.
- **`resolveSearchItems`** (21 tests): all 6 candidate-array paths, empty/missing payloads, non-object entries, URL/title/description/content/published field fallbacks, metadata precedence, empty-string edge cases.
- **`parseFirecrawlScrapePayload`** (16 tests): markdown/content fallback, no-content throws, text vs markdown mode, metadata enrichment, truncation boundaries (exact, 1-over, zero), warning field handling, type safety for statusCode and title.

## User Impact

No user-visible change. Increases test coverage for security-sensitive URL validation and data-extraction logic that previously had no direct unit coverage.

## Evidence

```
Test Files  1 passed (1)
     Tests  52 passed (52)
```
target.author: solodmd
